markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on strategic priorities and define Stevie's role.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Stevie's Role:** Shift from pure operational cadence to strategic ownership, connecting all team work to the core goal of validating organic growth and a feature-complete product.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [**Top Priority:** Validate the private workspace with real clients (e.g., Brex) to prove end-to-end value. This is the immediate blocker to closing the "complete loop" (visitor → user → paid).](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [**Public Site Focus:** Prioritize fixing the public site's navigation and content quality to convert growing impressions into clicks. This is the long-term driver of organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Stevie will now own the 1:1 agenda to structure discussions and will resume sending weekly Friday updates to maintain team alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2564.0)

## Topics

### Reframing Success: From Process to Outcome

  - [Marcel clarified that success is defined by outcomes, not just operational cadence. An efficient process is the "how," but it must deliver the "why."](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [**The "Why":** The business model depends entirely on organic growth. The current burn rate is unsustainable with paid acquisition ($15–$20/click).](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Two Core Success Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
    1.  [**Organic Growth:** Validate a sustainable organic growth model.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
    2.  [**Feature Completeness:** Prove the private workspace is usable end-to-end and delivers value.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

### Validating the Private Workspace (Top Priority)

  - [The immediate focus is validating the private workspace with real clients to prove end-to-end value.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [**Brex Demo Feedback:** A demo with Brex revealed critical gaps that are blockers to adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [**Missing AI Engines:** No support for AI modes/overviews; Claude is irrelevant for search.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [**Inadequate Visualizations:** Key data visualizations are missing.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [**Poor Prompt Management:** The admin panel is "choppy" and inefficient.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2346.0)
      - [**Limited Category Views:** Users see only one category (e.g., "expense management"), which misrepresents the product's full capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2309.0)
  - [**Validation Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2237.0)
      - [Compare metrics against competitors (e.g., Scrunch) for the same clients (Brex, Webflow).](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2237.0)
      - [Any team confusion with the product signals a guaranteed user experience problem.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)

### Improving the Public Site for Organic Growth

  - [The public site's goal is converting impressions into clicks to drive organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [**Current State:** The site gets impressions but zero clicks, indicating a problem with content quality and navigation.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [**Key Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
      - [**Poor Navigation:** Too many clicks to find brands; no intuitive way to see all categories for a brand.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
      - [**Orphaned Pages:** Lack of cross-linking hinders indexing and user discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
  - [**Required Fixes:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2140.0)
      - [**CMS:** Implement a CMS to enable rapid testing of page content and structure.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2140.0)
      - [**Cross-linking:** Improve site navigation to create a cohesive, indexable experience.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2164.0)

### Stevie's Role & Responsibilities

  - [Stevie's role is to connect all team work to the strategic goals of organic growth and feature completeness.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [**Key Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
      - [**Strategic Alignment:** Ensure all work directly contributes to validating the core business model.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
      - [**Process Ownership:** Own the process for creating and testing new categories, then delegate execution to the team (Kavishka, Carrie).](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2413.0)
      - [**Communication:** Resume weekly Friday updates to provide team-wide clarity and alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2564.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2470.0)
      - [Read the Pricing & Monetization Strategy doc to align on the business model.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2470.0)
      - [Own the 1:1 agenda to structure discussions around priorities and blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [Resume sending weekly Friday updates to the team.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2564.0)
      - [Focus on defining and testing the process for creating new categories.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2413.0)
      - [Delegate category and prompt creation to Kavishka and Carrie.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2448.0)
      - [Focus on building the sign-up and onboarding flows to close the "complete loop."](https://fathom.video/share/ZzVtUMRjhL8QQnBV8krBjVrKbDh55j7z?tab=summary&timestamp=2448.0)
